description: Maps NuGet package name patterns (case-insensitive glob) to provider attribution buckets used by scripts/provider-cve-report.sh. Build-time tooling only; not referenced by Program.cs or any AOT-shipped code. Update this file when a new SDK is added to azureopenai-cli/AzureOpenAI_CLI.csproj.

azure.label: Azure OpenAI / Azure AI Foundry SDK
azure.notes: Azure-side dispatch path. Findings here gate Azure-provider releases per docs/security/cve-policy.md.

openai.label: OpenAI SDK (compat-only path)
openai.notes: OpenAI-compat dispatch path (S03E08-E09). CVEs here attribute to the compat surface, not the Azure surface. Operators that never set AZ_AI_COMPAT_MODELS are not exposed.

shared.label: Shared / cross-provider runtime
shared.notes: Runtime, agent framework, telemetry, env loader. CVEs here affect every dispatch path; tolerance band is the strictest of the three.

fallback_notes: Any package not matched by an explicit pattern is bucketed as 'shared'. This is conservative -- a CVE in an unattributed dep is treated as cross-cutting until a maintainer says otherwise.
